hindi: नमो नमो दुर्गे सुख करनी। नमो नमो अम्बे दुख हरनी॥
english: Salutations to Durga, bringer of happiness; salutations to Amba, remover of sorrow
roman: Namo Namo Durge Sukh Karni, Namo Namo Ambe Dukh Harni

hindi: निराकार है ज्योति तुम्हारी। तिहूँ लोक फैली उजियारी॥
english: Your divine light is formless; its radiance spreads through all three worlds
roman: Nirakar Hai Jyoti Tumhari, Tihun Lok Pheli Ujiyari

hindi: शशि ललाट मुख महाविशाला। नेत्र लाल भृकुटि विकराला॥
english: A crescent moon adorns her forehead, her face is magnificent; her eyes are red and her brows fierce
roman: Shashi Lalat Mukh Mahavishala, Netra Lal Bhrikuti Vikrala

hindi: रूप मातु को अधिक सुहावे। दरश करत जन अति सुख पावे॥
english: Mother's form is supremely beautiful; devotees who behold it attain great happiness
roman: Roop Matu Ko Adhik Suhave, Darsh Karat Jan Ati Sukh Pave

hindi: तुम संसार शक्ति लय कीना। पालन हेतु अन्न धन दीना॥
english: You have absorbed the power of the universe; granted food and wealth for its sustenance
roman: Tum Sansaar Shakti Lay Kina, Palan Hetu Ann Dhan Dina

hindi: अन्नपूर्णा हुई जग पाला। तुमही आदि शक्ति महाकाला॥
english: You became Annapurna and sustained the world; you are the primal Shakti and Mahakali
roman: Annapurna Hui Jag Pala, Tumhi Aadi Shakti Mahakala

hindi: दुर्गा चालीसा जो गाए। सो सुख संपत्ति जग में पाए॥
english: Whoever sings the Durga Chalisa; attains happiness and prosperity in the world
roman: Durga Chalisa Jo Gaaye, So Sukh Sampatti Jag Mein Paaye

hindi: जय जय जय दुर्गे सुख करनी। जय जय माँ अम्बे दुख हरनी॥
english: Victory to Durga bringer of happiness; victory to Amba remover of sorrow
roman: Jai Jai Jai Durge Sukh Karni, Jai Jai Maa Ambe Dukh Harni
